title: Senior Teacher - IIM Bangalore - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Bangalore - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
